name: ChatMessage
description: Sender-context wrapper for a chat message: avatar, name, bubble content, and metadata. API mirrors industry convention (Astryx ChatMessage); sender-based alignment flipping needs layout-by-enum — a documented gap; the bubble color follows sender.

props.name: sender
props.description: Who sent it — drives the bubble color scheme.

props.name: name
props.description: Sender name shown above the message body.

slots.description: Timestamp and delivery status below the bubble.
